summary: Comprehensive testing of Premium BBQ Builder enhancements. All 16 BBQ products (11 original + 5 new) load correctly. Colored grade system with emojis (👑 Prime Gold, 💎 Wagyu Platinum, 🌿 Grass Fed Green) working. White text descriptions readable on dark backgrounds. Premium animations (sparkle icons, card transitions) present. Admin CMS shows all 16 products with full CRUD capabilities. Backend API tests: 8/8 passed.

issues: ResizeObserver loop errors appear in console (non-critical browser warnings, do not affect functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: All 16 BBQ products correctly seeded and displayed
New products have correct pricing: Italian Sausages $18, Bratwurst $16, Lamb Chops $42, Chicken Drumsticks $12, Chicken Wings $14
Colored grade legend displays correctly with emojis and gradient backgrounds
Grade dropdown dynamically shows only applicable grades per product (sausages/chicken have no Wagyu option)
Product descriptions are white (#F1F5F9) on dark backgrounds - readable
Premium animations: sparkle keyframes, slideDown animation, hover transitions all present in CSS
Meat type organization: beef (10), lamb (1), pork (3), chicken (2) - sorted correctly
Admin CMS BBQ Products Manager shows all 16 products with Edit/Delete functionality
seed_data_creation: 16 BBQ products seeded in database (10 beef, 1 lamb, 3 pork, 2 chicken)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium BBQ Builder fully functional with 16 products. New products: Italian Sausages ($18), Bratwurst ($16), Lamb Chops ($42), Chicken Drumsticks ($12), Chicken Wings ($14). Colored grade system: Prime=Gold gradient, Wagyu=Platinum gradient, Grass Fed=Green gradient. Products sorted by meat type. Sausages and chicken have no Wagyu/dry-aged options. Lamb Chops has higher grass-fed upcharge ($12). All descriptions white text on dark backgrounds.

details: All 16 products load from API
Products sorted by meat type (beef, lamb, pork, chicken)
Correct base prices for all products
New products: Italian Sausages $18, Bratwurst $16, Lamb Chops $42, Chicken Drumsticks $12, Chicken Wings $14
👑 Prime badge with gold gradient (FFD700 to FFA500)
💎 Wagyu badge with platinum gradient (E5E4E2 to C0C0C0)
🌿 Grass Fed badge with green gradient (32CD32 to 228B22)
Badges have hover effects and box shadows
Grade dropdown shows colored options with icons
Dynamically shows only applicable grades per product
Sausages/chicken show no Wagyu option (wagyuUpcharge=0)
Chicken shows no dry-aged option (dryAgedUpcharge=0)
Product descriptions use color #F1F5F9 (white/light gray)
Descriptions have gold left border accent
Background uses rgba(200, 169, 106, 0.05) for subtle contrast
Sparkle icons animate with 2s ease-in-out infinite
Card hover transitions with translateY and scale
Checkout button has ripple effect on hover
Options panel has slideDown animation
Base price + grade upcharge + dry-aged upcharge * quantity
Multi-meat selection updates total correctly
Conditional upcharges only shown if > 0
Admin BBQ Products Manager shows all 16 products
Edit/Delete buttons functional
+ Add BBQ Product button present
Product details: Base Price, Wagyu Upcharge, Grass Fed Upcharge, Dry Aged Upcharge, Ranch, Grade
